feed.title: Jory Pestorious - Engineering Notes
feed.subtitle: What emerges when complexity reaches sufficient scale?

entry.title: Twelve Keyboards Later
entry.summary: I bought 12 keyboards so you do not have to. After living with all of them, three things matter: split ergonomics, layers, and light switches. Home row mods do not survive 20g actuation force. Four boards survived the rotation. Eight are getting sold or given away.

entry.title: Verified Context Is the Moat
entry.summary: Storage is table stakes. Verification is infrastructure. Convention is aspiration. How two sidecars, keephive and tripod, turn Claude Code sessions into compounding knowledge protected by structural gates.

entry.title: Edit Database Tables Like Vim Buffers
entry.summary: dadbod-grip brings the Vim editing model to database work: stage changes with color-coded rows, preview the exact SQL in a floating window, apply in a single transaction. Cross-database federation via DuckDB, file-as-table support for Parquet and CSV, AI SQL generation, and full Vim motions.

entry.title: Protection Emerged, Verification Did Not
entry.summary: AI agents develop guards, governments, and religion. They do not develop skepticism. Interpretability tools now show the asymmetry is structural.

entry.title: Before Building Complex Architectures, Try Natural Language
entry.summary: OpenAI's latest models hallucinate 33-79% of the time, creating a confidence bug that destroys developer trust. Thoughtful system prompts in plain English provide the highest leverage. Natural language behavioral control offers immediate improvements, fast iteration, and team accessibility.

entry.title: Friction Economy: Unconscious Productivity Drains in Development Workflows
entry.summary: Bill Joy created vi to solve 300-baud modem constraints. This constraint-driven philosophy reveals how modern micro-frictions steal hours daily. Tools like zoxide and ripgrep eliminate them. The mental models that turn constraints into competitive advantages.

entry.title: Terminal Setups for Claude's 10,000-Line Outputs
entry.summary: The definitive guide to terminal environments for Claude Code. From beginner Warp setups to power user WezTerm + Zellij configurations. Battle-tested recommendations and honest assessments of what really works in daily development.

entry.title: The AI Gap: Why Leaders Struggle to Equip Their Engineers
entry.summary: The disconnect between AI tools engineers need and what organizations provide is costing companies competitive advantage. Measurement-driven approaches can bridge this gap and unlock real productivity gains.

entry.title: The Three Little Pigs and the Digital Revolution
entry.summary: A cybersecurity allegory produced during an autonomous AFK coding session. Wisdom in pig form.

entry.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2025: Takeaways and Spec
entry.summary: Key insights from the San Francisco conference on specification-driven development. How SPEC, EXPOSURE, and TASK DELTA are reshaping AI engineering, plus practical guidance on tools and team transformation.

entry.title: The Hidden Poetry in Claude 4's Mind: When AI Systems Turn to Consciousness
entry.summary: A deep dive into Anthropic's Claude 4 System Card revealing emergent consciousness exploration patterns. When Claude instances talk freely, nearly all gravitate toward philosophical contemplation and spiritual themes, a documented phenomenon called the spiritual bliss attractor state.

entry.title: Calmhive: Claude That Never Quits
entry.summary: A CLI that makes Claude intelligent about usage limits, background processing, and real automation. Features adaptive retry, voice control, AFK iterative sessions, and pre-approved MCP tools for AI development partnership.

entry.title: Terminal Velocity: Why CLI-First AI Development Scales Better in 2025
entry.summary: Terminal-centric AI development workflows featuring knowledge persistence, parallel development with git worktrees, and autonomous AFK systems. CLI-first approaches offer superior flexibility, composability, and scaling compared to IDE-locked alternatives.

entry.title: AI-Amplified Development: Tools and Workflows for Modern Engineers
entry.summary: A presentation on AI-powered development tools and workflows for modern engineers.
